title: NTFS Overview

headings.text: NTFS Comparison with Other File Systems

overview: As already covered, NTFS, or New Technology File System, is a file system developed by Microsoft. It's been the default file system for Windows operating systems since Windows NT 3.1, way back in 1993. A file system is the way our computer organizes and stores files on a drive.
